tools.name: channels.createChannel
tools.description: Used to create a channel. A channel collects data from an MQTT topic and archives the raw, unprocessed messages before publishing the data to a pipeline.

tools.name: channels.deleteChannel
tools.description: Deletes the specified channel.

tools.name: channels.describeChannel
tools.description: Retrieves information about a channel.

tools.name: channels.listChannels
tools.description: Retrieves a list of channels.

tools.name: channels.sampleChannelData
tools.description: Retrieves a sample of messages from the specified channel ingested during the specified timeframe. Up to 10 messages can be retrieved.

tools.name: channels.updateChannel
tools.description: Used to update the settings of a channel.

tools.name: datasets.createDataset
tools.description: Used to create a dataset. A dataset stores data retrieved from a data store by applying a queryAction (a SQL query) or a containerAction (executing a containerized application). This operation creates the skeleton of a dataset. The dataset can be populated manually by calling CreateDatasetContent or automatically according to a trigger you specify.

tools.name: datasets.createDatasetContent
tools.description: Creates the content of a dataset by applying a queryAction (a SQL query) or a containerAction (executing a containerized application).

tools.name: datasets.deleteDataset
tools.description:
Deletes the specified dataset.

You do not have to delete the content of the dataset before you perform this operation.

tools.name: datasets.deleteDatasetContent
tools.description: Deletes the content of the specified dataset.

tools.name: datasets.describeDataset
tools.description: Retrieves information about a dataset.

tools.name: datasets.getDatasetContent
tools.description: Retrieves the contents of a dataset as presigned URIs.

tools.name: datasets.listDatasetContents
tools.description: Lists information about dataset contents that have been created.

tools.name: datasets.listDatasets
tools.description: Retrieves information about datasets.

tools.name: datasets.updateDataset
tools.description: Updates the settings of a dataset.

tools.name: datastores.createDatastore
tools.description: Creates a data store, which is a repository for messages.

tools.name: datastores.deleteDatastore
tools.description: Deletes the specified data store.

tools.name: datastores.describeDatastore
tools.description: Retrieves information about a data store.

tools.name: datastores.listDatastores
tools.description: Retrieves a list of data stores.

tools.name: datastores.updateDatastore
tools.description: Used to update the settings of a data store.

tools.name: logging.describeLoggingOptions
tools.description: Retrieves the current settings of the IoT Analytics logging options.

tools.name: logging.putLoggingOptions
tools.description:
Sets or updates the IoT Analytics logging options.

If you update the value of any loggingOptions field, it takes up to one minute for the change to take effect. Also, if you change the policy attached to the role you specified in the roleArn field (for example, to correct an invalid policy), it takes up to five minutes for that change to take effect.

tools.name: messages.batchPutMessage
tools.description: Sends messages to a channel.

tools.name: pipelineactivities.runPipelineActivity
tools.description: Simulates the results of running a pipeline activity on a message payload.

tools.name: pipelines.cancelPipelineReprocessing
tools.description: Cancels the reprocessing of data through the pipeline.

tools.name: pipelines.createPipeline
tools.description: Creates a pipeline. A pipeline consumes messages from a channel and allows you to process the messages before storing them in a data store. You must specify both a channel and a datastore activity and, optionally, as many as 23 additional activities in the pipelineActivities array.

tools.name: pipelines.deletePipeline
tools.description: Deletes the specified pipeline.

tools.name: pipelines.describePipeline
tools.description: Retrieves information about a pipeline.

tools.name: pipelines.listPipelines
tools.description: Retrieves a list of pipelines.

tools.name: pipelines.startPipelineReprocessing
tools.description: Starts the reprocessing of raw message data through the pipeline.

tools.name: pipelines.updatePipeline
tools.description: Updates the settings of a pipeline. You must specify both a channel and a datastore activity and, optionally, as many as 23 additional activities in the pipelineActivities array.

tools.name: tagsResourceArn.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags (metadata) that you have assigned to the resource.

tools.name: tagsResourceArn.tagResource
tools.description: Adds to or modifies the tags of the given resource. Tags are metadata that can be used to manage a resource.

tools.name: tagsResourceArnTagKeys.untagResource
tools.description: Removes the given tags (metadata) from the resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
